arts.ttl: Bowen returns and Irving makes full debut at Chelsea
arts.sum: Alongside Mavropanos will be goalkeepers Łukasz Fabiański and Wes Foderingham, Academy of Football graduate trio Kaelan Casey, Ollie Scarles and Lewis Orford, midfielders Guido Rodríguez and Luis Guilherme and forward Danny Ings. West Ham United: Areola, Wan-Bissaka, Coufal, Kilman, Cresswell, Emerson, Rodríguez, Souček, Soler, Kudus, Bowen ©

arts.ttl: Rayan Cherki transfer stance revealed as Lyon respond to £20m offer amid Chelsea and Liverpool links
arts.sum: "We rejected Borussia Dortmund's offer and do not intend to negotiate with them or any other club," the Lyon owner has reportedly told Fabrizio Romano . Lyon owner John Textor has reputedly announced they do not intend to negotiate with any clubs regarding Rayan Cherki.
